positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration featuring a group of anthropomorphic, friendly forest creatures (fox, owl, deer, rabbit) gathering for a picnic in a lush, sun-dappled woodland clearing. The style should be detailed, modern nature illustration, reminiscent of high-end children's book art, with clean outlines and strong, vibrant color palettes (deep emerald, sapphire blue, terracotta orange). Focus on clear silhouettes and central composition. Include elements like floating whimsical forest sprites, oversized mushrooms, and intricately patterned foliage. The lighting should be soft, ethereal, and dappled, suggesting late afternoon golden hour. The art must be high resolution, suitable for a large-format, single-color screen print or direct-to-garment apparel transfer. Isolated on a white background.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, realistic, photo, messy, grayscale
